headline: What Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR)'s ISK Derivatives Expansion and Stablecoin Funding Push Means For Shareholders
summary: Interactive Brokers recently expanded its Swedish ISK accounts to allow trading in global futures and options, portfolio lending, and broad access to international markets, while also rolling out stablecoin funding for U.S. clients to speed up account funding and capital access. Together with February data showing higher daily average revenue trades, more client accounts, and increased client equity, these product enhancements underline Interactive Brokers’ push to combine tax-efficient...

headline: Interactive Brokers Enables Broader Global Diversification Within Swedish ISK Accounts
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., March 03, 2026--Interactive Brokers enables broader global diversification within Swedish ISK accounts.
